---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Alpelisib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Alpelisib</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Alpelisib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Piqray is indicated in combination with fulvestrant for the treatment of postmenopausal women, and men, with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.0%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（99.0%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.8%）</li>
<li>leprosy（98.7%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.7%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（98.6%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（98.4%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.4%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.3%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（98.1%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.1%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（98.1%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（98.0%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（97.9%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（97.9%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（97.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
